use_cases: Plan or subscription selection in SaaS applications
Theme-aware settings dropdown for user preferences
Animated option selection in pricing or onboarding flows
ai_summary: A sophisticated animated dropdown component with dark/light theme toggle and orthogonal grid background. Features smooth Framer Motion animations for open/close transitions, check mark indicators for selected items, and plan descriptions. The theme toggle demonstrates a glass-morphism aesthetic with clean typography, making it ideal for modern SaaS pricing pages, settings panels, or any premium form interface requiring elegant option selection.
